content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description claims "Built-in ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift only implements a plain in-memory task list with no ad-blocking, ML/AI, or persistence code (App/ContentView.swift:1-24).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose metadata promises features the binary does not deliver, since it misleads users during discovery. Here the description in fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt advertises three prominent capabilities (ad blocker, AI suggestions, offline) with zero corresponding implementation or imports in the code. Either add real implementations for these features or remove the unsupported claims from the description before submitting.
